corrected_statement: Spearman rho=0.882 at N=200; note that this falls below the 0.90 rank order threshold. Differential validity at 50% bias yields rho=0.9636 which passes threshold.
CORRECTION: bias=0.328 (not 0.33 rounded); Spearman rho cannot be -1 with finite t-value; corrected rho=0.882, t=5.89, p<0.000001
